Colossians 2:6-7: Kon nag, ni ngeen nangoo Almasi Yeesu di Sang bi, àndleen ak moom, jëfe noonu. Sampleen seeni reen ci moom, tabaxleen seen bopp ci moom, feddalikuleen ci wàllu ngëm, ni ñu leen ko jàngale, ba seenub xol baawaan ak kàdduy cant.

Ecclesiastes 4:9-10: Ñaar a man kenn; doñ-doñoondoo, yoolu bu baax. Kenn daanu, moroom ma may ko loxo. Waaye ngalla ku daanu te amuloo ku la may loxo!
Ecclesiastes 7:8: Fa mbir mujjee gën fa mu doore, te muñ a gën réy-réylu.
Ecclesiastes 9:10: Liggéey boo gis, liggéeyal; def ci loo man. Ndax muy jëf, di doxalin, di xam-xam, di manoore, dara amu ci njaniiw ga nga jëm.
Song of Solomon 2:4: Dugal na ma néegub sago-jeex-na, yiire ma mbëggeel.

Song of Solomon 4:7: Xarit, sa lépp a rafet, sikk nekkul ci yaw.
Song of Solomon 8:6-7: Teg ma ci sa xol ni torlukaay, mbaa ci sa përëg ni lamu màndarga. Mbëggeel a bare doole ni dee, fiiraange xér ni bàmmeel. Day jàpp jippét, di jum bu Aji Sax ji taal. Isaiah 12:3: Mbégte ngeen di rooteji fa wali mucc ya.

Isaiah 35:4: Ku fitam rëcc, ne leen ko: «Dëgërlul te bul tiit. Sa Yàllaa ngii di la feyul, ba yool say noon. Moom mooy dikk, wallusi la.»

Isaiah 42:16: Maay doxloo silmaxa yi ci yoon wu ñu xamul, ñall wu ñu miinul laa leen di jaarale. Maa leen di soppil lëndëm gi fi seen kanam ag leer, fu ñagas, ma maasaleel leen. Lii laa leen di defal, te duma leen wacc mukk!
Isaiah 49:10: Duñu xiif, duñu mar; tàngooru mbóoyo akub jant du leen sonal, nde ki leen ñeewantee leen di wommat, di leen yóbbu fu ndox bënne.
Isaiah 51:12-13: Man ci sama bopp maa leen di dëfal. Ana lu ngeen di ragal ci nit kuy dee, doom aadama ju bokk aw demin akum ñax? Dangeena fàtte Aji Sax ji leen sàkk, ki firi asamaan, lal suuf? Dangeen di dëkke bésoo bés, di tiit xadaru boroom doole buy waaja sànke? Ana fu xadaru boroom doole mujje?
Isaiah 54:17: Ngànnaay lu ñu la mana sàkkal, du sotti, te boroom làmmiñ wu la jógal cib layoo yaa koy tiiñal. Ñiy jaamu Aji Sax ji, looloo di seen cér, looloo di àtte bi ma leen di dikke.» Kàddug Aji Sax jee.
Isaiah 55:1: «Éey, yeen ñi mar ñépp, dikkleen ci ndox mi, ba ci ku amul xaalis sax! Dikkleen jënd pepp, lekk! Dikkleen jënd pepp mu xaalis jëndul, ak biiñ ak meew mu amul pey.
Isaiah 57:15: Ku màgg, Ku kawe ki, ki màkkaanam sax dàkk te turam sell, daa wax ne: «Fu kawe te sell laa màkkaanoo, maa dëkk ak boroom xol bu mokk te toroxlu, ngir leqali ku toroxlu, leqali boroom xol bu mokk.
Isaiah 60:19-20: Du jant a lay leeralati bëccëg, te weer du la niital; Aji Sax jeey doon sag leer ba fàww, sa Yàlla jooju di sab taar. Sab jant du sooti, sa weer du suuxati. Aji Sax jeey doon sag leer ba fàww, sa fani ñaawlu jeex.
Isaiah 61:10: Maa bég a bég ci Aji Sax ji, sama xol di sedd ci sama Yàlla jii. Moo ma solal yérey mucc, sànge ma mbubbam ndam, may nirook boroom séet bu kaalawu ni sarxalkat, ne xenjaw ni séet bu takki gànjaram.
Isaiah 62:5: Ni xale bu góor di takke ab janq, ni la la sa doom yu góor di moome ni jëkkër; ni boroom séet di bégee ab séetam, ni la la sa Yàlla di bégee.
Jeremiah 17:14: Éy Aji Sax ji, faj ma, ma faju; musal ma, ma mucc, samag cant, yaw a.
Jeremiah 29:14: maa leen di may ngeen daj ma. Kàddug Aji Sax jee. Maa leen di tijjil seen wërsëg, dajale leen ci mboolem xeet ak mboolem béreb ya ma leen sànni woon. Kàddug Aji Sax jee. Maa leen di delloosi ci béreb bii ma leen yebale woon ngàllo.
Jeremiah 31:13: «Su boobaa janq bégem pooj, waxambaaneek mag feelu ko, ma soppi seen ñaawlu mbégte, dëfal leen, bànneexal leen, ñu dëddu naqar.
Jeremiah 33:3: Mu ne: “Woo ma, ma wuyu la, wax la lu réy te ruqe, loo xamul woon.”
Lamentations 3:31-32: Boroom bi déy du la wacc ba fàww. Bu la tegee naqar it, yërëm la, ngoram a ni baree.
Ezekiel 11:19: Maa leen di may beneen xol, te xel mu yees laay def ci ñoom. Seen xol ni doj yi laay roccee ci seen yaram, wecceel leen ko xol yu nooye ni suux.
Ezekiel 36:27: te samam xel laay yeb fi seen biir dënn, ba dogal ngeen mana topp sama dogali yoon, di sàmm aka jëfe sama àttey yoon.
Hosea 14:4: Asiri du nu xettali, ay fasi xare it, dunu ko war, te dootunu wax lu nu sàkke sunuy loxo, ne ko: “Yaw yaa di sunu Yàlla.” Li nuy wax kay mooy yaw yaay kiy yërëm jirim.»
Amos 5:14: Sàkkuleen lu baax, bàyyi lu bon, ba dund, Aji Sax ji Boroom gàngoor yi ànd ak yeen, muy li ngeen wax.
Obadiah 1:17: Waaye kaw tundu Siyoŋ la aw ndes di rawe, te dina doon béreb bu sell, waa kër Yanqóoba it moomaat seeni moomeel.
Jonah 2:2: Yunus ñaan ci Yàllaam Aji Sax ji, fa mu tollu ca biir jën wa.
Micah 7:7: Man nag Aji Sax ji laay séentu, Yàlla ji may musal laay xaar, te sama Yàllaa may nangul.
Habakkuk 2:4: «Xol baa ngay xoggaliku, te ag njub nekku ca, waaye ku jub ndax kóllëreem ak Yàlla mooy dund.
Haggai 2:9: Daraja ji kër gii di mujje mooy sut ja woon, Aji Sax ji Boroom gàngoor yee ko wax. Mu ne: Ci bii béreb laay mayee jàmm, kàddug Aji Sax jee, Boroom gàngoor yi.”»
Zechariah 8:16-17: «Ndigal yii, nangeen ko jëfe: Deeleen waxante dëgg, te dëgg ak yoon, nangeen ko àttee àtteb jàmm ci seen ëtti àttekaay. Ku nekk ci yeen, loraangey moroomam, bumu ko mébét cib xolam, te kàddug ngiñ ci ay fen, buleen ko safoo, nde loolu lépp laa bañ.» Kàddug Aji Sax jee.
Zechariah 8:23: «Aji Sax ji Boroom gàngoor yi dafa wax ne: Janti keroog yooyu, fukk ñuy làkk mboolem làkki xeet yi, ñooy langaamoo catu mbubbu benn Yawut, naan ko: “Nun, yeen lanuy àndal, nde noo dégg ne Yàllaa ngeek yeen.”»
Matthew 5:16: Yeen, na seenug leer leere noonu ci kanam nit ñi, ngir ñu gis seen jëf ju rafet, ba sàbbaal seen Baay ba fa kaw.
Matthew 6:20-21: Waaye dajaleleen ab denc fa asamaan, fa ko max ak xomaag dul yàqe, te ab sàcc du bëtt, jël ko. Ndaxte fa sab denc nekk, sab xol it a nga fa.
Luke 6:36: Ni seen Baay ame yërmande nag, nangeen ni ame yërmande.
